snippet.description:
Ramy Gamal - Entahena [Official Lyrics Video] | رامي جمال - ⁠انتهينا
• From Album De Alama 2026 | من ألبوم دي علامه

Listen now “De Alama” Album on all platforms | اسمع الآن لألبوم "دي علامه" على كل المنصات
https://Viralwave.lnk.to/DeAlamaAlbum

• Lyrics: Ahmed Gaber | أحمد جابر
• Composed by: Mohamed Shehata | محمد شحاته
• Arrangement, Mix & Master: Wissam Abdel Moneim | وسام عبد المنعم
• Social Media: Radwa Ali | رضوى علي
• Video & Poster: John H. Mekram | جون مكرم
• Business Management: Mo’men Mahmoud - Abdalla Nasr | مؤمن محمود - عبدالله نصر
• Digital Distribution: @ViralWavenet 

Lyrics | الكلمات

انتهينا زي ما انت ما بتتمنى 
بس المرة دي أنا اللي مش هاستنى 
مش طبيعي افضل تاعب في قلبي معاك 

انتهينا دي حقيقة مش هنجمل 
اي حد لو مكاني مش هيكمل 
كل الناس تغلط عادي انما انت ملاك 

سيب ماتحاولش تاني كل شيء قسمة ونصيب 
مش هتمتلكني طب ده حتى يبقى عيب 
عادي م النهارده يعني تعتبر غريب 
هو ده اللي لازم اعمله 

فين اللي كنت مش فارقله لسه من يومين 
واللي كان بينهي كل شي في كلمتين
جاي تعتذر بذمتك بأي عين 
اللي خد قرار يكمله  

انت عايز كل حاجة تمشي براحتك 
ع العموم ده مش طريقي شوف مصلحتك 
كنت فترة أنا استفدت منها كتير 

الحنيه والبراءه دول من امتى 
التجاهل حل للي زيك انت 
واطمن بعدك هاكون تمام وبخير 

سيب ماتحاولش تاني كل شيء قسمة ونصيب 
مش هتمتلكني طب ده حتى يبقى عيب 
عادي م النهارده يعني تعتبر غريب 
هو ده اللي لازم اعمله 

فين اللي كنت مش فارقله لسه من يومين 
واللي كان بينهي كل شي في كلمتين
جاي تعتذر بذمتك بأي عين 
اللي خد قرار يكمله

snippet.title: इकरार हो न जाए | Zinda Dil | Udit Narayan Songs | Abbas | Ashima Bhalla
snippet.description:
2000 के दशक की जादुई आवाज़ और दिल को छू लेने वाले संगीत की बात हो, तो उदित नारायण का नाम सबसे पहले आता है। 'ज़िंदा दिल' फिल्म का यह खूबसूरत नगमा 'इकरार हो न जाए' प्यार की उन कोमल भावनाओं को बयां करता है जो हर दिल की धड़कन में बसती हैं। यह गाना उस सुनहरे दौर की याद दिलाता है जब संगीत सिर्फ धुन नहीं, बल्कि एक एहसास हुआ करता था।



Credits :

Song: Ikrar Ho Na Jaye
Album: Zinda Dil
Artist: Udit Narayan
Music Director: Nadeem-Shravan
Lyricist: Sameer 



Lyrics :

O ho ho ey hey hey
Iqaraar ho na jaaye
Izahaar ho na jaaye
Izahaar ho na jaaye
Izahaar ho na jaaye
Is mausam mein kahin
Mujhe pyaar ho na jaaye
O ho ho hey hey hey hey
Hey hey hey.. Hey hey hey hey


Saagar ki maujein hain
Khulaa aasmaan hai
Dhadkan deevaani hai
Dilkash samaa hai
Dhadkan deevaani hai
Dilkash samaa hai
Khvaabon ke hamsafar
Kaa deedaar ho na jaaye
Khvaabon ke hamsafar
Kaa deedaar ho na jaaye
Is mausam mein kahin
Mujhe pyaar ho na jaaye
O ho ho ho ho ho
Hey hey hey.. Hey hey hey hey


Jee chaahe lahron se
Karoon main sharaarat
Inko bataa doon main
Mere dil ki chaahat
Inko bataa doon main
Mere dil ki chaahat
Koi deevaanaa meraa
Dildaar ho na jaaye
Koi deevaanaa meraa
Dildaar ho na jaaye
Is mausam mein kahin
Mujhe pyaar ho na jaaye
O ho ho hey hey hey hey
O ho ho hey hey hey hey
Iqaraar ho na jaaye
Izahaar ho na jaaye
Is mausam mein kahin
Mujhe pyaar ho na jaaye
Hey hey hey.. Ey hey hey
O ho ho ey hey hey.

इस मधुर गीत को सुनें और प्यार के उस एहसास में खो जाएं। अगर आपको यह गाना पसंद आया, तो वीडियो को लाइक करें, कमेंट में अपने पसंदीदा रोमांटिक गानों के बारे में बताएं और हमारे चैनल को सब्सक्राइब करना न भूलें ताकि आप संगीत की इस यात्रा में हमारे साथ बने रहें। Let the magic of music live on…

snippet.title: Black Clover Second Season | Official Trailer 3 | Crunchyroll
snippet.description:
A new saga begins! Black Clover Second Season is coming to Crunchyroll in 2026! Watch Black Clover on Crunchyroll! https://got.cr/cc-bcpv

In a world where magic is everything, Asta and Yuno are both found abandoned at a church on the same day. While Yuno is gifted with exceptional magical powers, Asta is the only one in this world without any. At the age of fifteen, both receive grimoires, magic books that amplify their holder’s magic. Asta’s is a rare Grimoire of Anti-Magic that negates and repels his opponent’s spells. Being opposite but good rivals, Yuno and Asta are ready for the hardest of challenges to achieve their common dream: to be the Wizard King. Giving up is never an option!

snippet.title: You Became My Peace | Official Lyric Video | TJ HyperMusic
snippet.description:
You became my peace when my heart was still healing. ❤️

“YOU BECAME MY PEACE” is an original emotional English love song about healing from the past, letting go of old pain, and finding someone who teaches you how to love again completely.

This song is for the person who came into your life when your heart was still carrying memories you couldn’t fully release. Not as an escape, not as a replacement, but as the peace you never expected to find.

It is for the person who arrived when your heart was still confused, tired, and afraid to love again. The person you did not use to forget someone else, but the one who became the reason you learned how to love fully and truly.

If someone became your peace after everything you went through, this song is for you.

🎧 Full song: You Became My Peace
🎵 Genre: Emotional Love Song / Melodic Rap Ballad
❤️ Theme: Love, healing, moving on, peace, second chance

Comment “PEACE” if this song reminds you of someone.

Don’t forget to like, comment, and subscribe for more original emotional love songs and lyric videos.

snippet.title: ARK Tides of Fortune & Dragontopia Trailer
snippet.description:
Set sail, take flight, and step into two massive new ARK adventures: ARK Tides of Fortune and ARK: Dragontopia, each bringing a distinct new frontier of survival, exploration, creatures, combat, and progression to the ARK universe.

ARK Tides of Fortune

Pull up a chair, Survivors. Everyone knows the legendary ARK veteran Bob - played by Karl Urban - but you haven't truly heard a tale until you've survived his swashbuckling exploits on the high seas. Hoist the sails and experience his next chapter of incredibly true adventures in ARK Tides of Fortune!

The simulated ocean of Genesis Ascended Part 1 has opened into a massive, map-wide nautical frontier. Chart a course across a vast sea, hunt for buried treasure, and clash with treacherous enemies in explosive naval combat. The new weapons, structures, cosmetics, and exotic creatures included in Tides of Fortune can be unleashed across the ARK universe, but the deep physics-driven waters of Genesis are where this swashbuckling arsenal truly comes alive. 

ARK Tides of Fortune - Steam
https://store.steampowered.com/app/4558480/ARK_Tides_of_Fortune/

ARK Tides of Fortune - Xbox
https://www.xbox.com/en-US/games/store/ark-tides-of-fortune/9NW717HPJDK9

ARK Tides of Fortune - PlayStation
https://store.playstation.com/en-us/product/UP0691-PPSA16810_00-TIDESOFFORTUNE01


ARK: Dragontopia

Tame the legends and rule the skies!

Awaken within a cloudbound paradise where the earth has fractured into a world of floating islands, and myths take flight. High above these magical grounds, Survivors must learn a new rhythm of survival alongside the true rulers of the sky: dragons. Across a vast aerial ecosystem, ARK: Dragontopia invites you to step off the edge and master the skies. Guided by the echoes of a lost order of dragonriders, you’ll enter a land where legends breathe anew. As a fierce new threat claims the horizon, it is up to you to restore balance!

LORDS OF THE SKY
Between the sun and moon, the skies teem with draconic legends. Encounter titanic behemoths that devour resources and enemies alike, elegant wind-dancing steeds that gallop across the clouds, deadly four-winged assassins, multi-headed beasts of dual-breathed chaos, and loyal shoulder-drakes that guard you on your journey. Every dragon demands its own path to taming, requiring you to observe, learn, and master their unique rhythms before they ever let you take the saddle.

THE DRAGONTOPIA ECOSYSTEM
To survive this high-altitude frontier, you’ll need to grow through the Dragon Skill Trees, a new progression system built around strengthening your bond with these mythical beasts. Craft specialized gear, wield potent tools, and expand your base with a draconic tileset, incubator backpacks, and mysterious potion stations. But these skies are contested, and you are the realm’s last hope to break the vanguard of a ruthless airborne invader!
The dragons are waking, the islands are calling, and the Skies of Dragontopia are yours to claim!

Dragonntopia - Steam
https://store.steampowered.com/app/4558490/ARK_Dragontopia/

Dragonntopia - Xbox
https://www.xbox.com/en-US/games/store/ark-dragontopia/9NB7PMZ290KX/0010

Dragonntopia - PlayStation
https://store.playstation.com/en-us/product/UP0691-PPSA16810_00-DRAGONTOPIADLC01

snippet.title: Dil Pe Zakham (Music Video) Madhur Sharma | Ustad Nusrat Fateh Ali Khan | Jaan Se Guzarte Hai
snippet.description:
Experience the pain, passion, and timeless soul of "Dil Pe Zakham", beautifully rendered by Madhur Sharma. Inspired by the immortal poetry and legacy of the legendary Nusrat Fateh Ali Khan, this heartfelt rendition blends soulful vocals with contemporary production to create an unforgettable musical experience.

If you've ever loved deeply, lost someone special, or found solace in music, this song will speak directly to your heart.

snippet.title: MDALMUSIC - Call me (Official Music Video)
snippet.description:
MDALMUSIC - Call me (Official Music Video)

Drift back in time and explore the ruins of memory with "Drift back in time and explore the ruins of memory with "Call me This track offers a deeply Relaxing journey through Deep House, infused with a delicate sense of Melancholy and the nostalgic touch of Nu Disco.

It's the perfect blend of reflective Sad House and soothing electronic rhythm. Let the gentle beat transport you to a place of forgotten beauty and peaceful sorrow.

🏰 Track Features:
Genre Focus: Deep House Relaxing, Nu Disco

Atmosphere: Nostalgic, Peaceful Melancholy, Dreamy
Ideal for: Chill study sessions, relaxing, or emotional unwinding.

🎶 Rediscover the Kingdom:

Thinking about you again, darkly
Leave your stubbornness and call me

At the bottom of these intertwined bottles

snippet.title: Koi Nhi Mere Pass – Aarzoo Khaan | Emotional Hindi Sad Song | New Song 2026 | Arijit Singh Vibe
snippet.description:
Koi Nhi Mere Pass – Aarzoo Khaan | Emotional Hindi Sad Song | New Song 2026 | Arijit Singh Vibe


---


Koi nhi mere pass...
bas teri yaadein reh gayi hain.

Jise apna sab kuch maana tha...
aaj wahi sabse door ho gaya.

Ab na koi humsafar hai...
na koi apna kehne wala...
bas tanhai hai
aur kuch adhure ehsaas hain.

“Koi Nhi Mere Pass”
ek aise dil ki kahani hai
jo mohabbat me toot kar
tanha reh gaya.

Bahut log mile zindagi me...
magar dil ne sirf tumhe apna maana tha.

Aaj jab tum nahi ho...
to lagta hai jaise
mere paas kuch bhi nahi bacha.

Is gaane mein
dard bhi hai,
tanhai bhi hai,
aur ek gehra ehsaas bhi
jo dheere se kehta hai —

koi nhi mere pass...
bas teri yaadein mere saath hain...

Agar aapne bhi
kabhi kisi ko
apni rooh se zyada chaha ho
aur uske jaane ke baad tanha reh gaye ho,
to ye gaana
aapke dil ko chhoo jaayega.

snippet.title: اغنية منتخب مصر في كاس العالم 2026 | من ماتش مصر ونيوزلاندا |  FIFA World Cup 2026 egy song
snippet.description:
اغنية منتخب مصر في كاس العالم 2026 | من ماتش مصر وبلجيكا |  FIFA World Cup 2026 egy song


شاهد أجواء افتتاح مشوار منتخب مصر في كأس العالم 2026 عبر لقطات حصرية من داخل الملعب وتجمعات الجماهير. استعد لتعيش لحظات الحماس.

يستعرض هذا الفيديو كواليس انطلاقة منتخب مصر في منافسات كأس العالم 2026، حيث يركز على التفاعل الجماهيري الكبير الذي صاحب المباراة. إذا كنت من عشاق كرة القدم وتود متابعة تفاصيل الحدث، فهذا التقرير ينقل لك نبض الشارع والمدرجات في قلب الحدث.

تغطي اللقطات تواجد المشجعين أمام شاشات العرض الكبيرة وتفاعلهم مع مجريات اللقاء، بالإضافة إلى صور حصرية للاعبين أثناء تواجدهم داخل الملعب. نهدف من خلال هذه التغطية إلى وضعك في قلب مشوار منتخب مصر، موثقين لحظات الاحتفال والصخب الجماهيري التي ميزت هذا اليوم التاريخي ضمن مباريات كأس العالم.

اشترك في القناة لمتابعة المزيد من تغطيات مباريات كأس العالم، وأخبرنا في التعليقات عن توقعاتك لمسيرة الفريق في البطولة القادمة.

اعدام - لازمات ثقيلة - لازمات قديمه - لازمات الياميه - دبكات طربية 
دبكات طربية من الاخر - شلع - انا الشيخ وابن الشيخ - احنا الكاع 
النمشيها - مراجلنا تتمدد - من امشي بشارع ما اسأل - اشرب ازيد بكاسي 
اتعب ويثقل راسي - انعل ابو الفقر والمعاش الردى - كاسر 
خشم الي يتحداني - احنا نسير القوافل ونمشيها - كلشي حب لهالدنيا 
صدام وينك صدام - انت القلب وانت الروح - زيد الثلج هز الكاس 
اكسر شوكتها - سورى انا - هيبة من نمشي ضباط - رجعتلكم بعد غياب 
احنا الدولة والهيبه - احنا الهيبة من الله - انت هدية من ربي - الهدف 
مرصود والرشاش جاهز- تجي نتزوج بالسر  
العلاسة - يخرب بيتك عيد - بحظيني نامي .
